mxCell.value: Frozen EVL backbone (EFM3D / EVL) voxel heads + features
Pose-conditioned global pooling (MHA over pooled voxels)
MHA pooling Q: pose_enc KV: tokens + pos
Grid binning \(G=16 \Rightarrow G^2\) bins \(\texttt{counts}\in\mathbb{R}^{B N\times G^2}\)
pose→traj attention MultiheadAttention Q: pose_enc, KV: traj_pose_enc \(\texttt{traj\_ctx}\) (B,N,32)

diagram.name: Submodule: Feature concat + MLP scorer + CORAL

mxCell.value: Scorer MLP Linear 103→192 GELU + Dropout ×3 layers \((B\!N,192)\)
